overall.description: First-person game footage depicting a steady walk through a rain-soaked wooden tunnel transitioning into a lush stream valley. The sequence features realistic weather effects and natural lighting as the player moves from an enclosed log structure into an open waterway surrounded by rocky cliffs and dense forest vegetation.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dark wooden tunnel toward the bright exit ahead

entered.detail: rough-hewn horizontal logs forming the tunnel wall, wet from rain
overhead log beams creating a covered shelter from the rain
flowing water visible at the tunnel exit, reflecting light
rocky terrain and boulders visible through the tunnel opening

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view moving through a dark, rain-soaked wooden tunnel constructed from rough logs. The camera advances steadily toward a bright exit where a stream and green vegetation are visible in the distance. The enclosed space provides shelter from the rain, with water droplets visible on the wooden surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky stream valley with flowing water

events.description: exits the wooden tunnel into the open stream valley, revealing sky and surrounding forest

agents.ego_description: walking through the shallow stream water, navigating between rocky cliffs and vegetation

entered.detail: large moss-covered rock formation lining the left side of the stream
man-made or natural stone retaining wall on the right bank of the stream
dense stand of trees with white birch trunks visible on the hillside
gray cloudy sky visible above the valley, indicating rainy weather

segments.scene_description: Having exited the tunnel, the scene opens into a narrow stream valley with the camera moving through shallow flowing water. Rain falls steadily on the rocky cliffs to the left and stone walls to the right, while dense forest vegetation climbs the valley slopes. The overcast sky provides diffused lighting over the lush green landscape as the journey continues upstream.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the confines of a dark, rain-soaked wooden tunnel into the expansive openness of a lush stream valley. It begins by advancing through a structure of rough logs, where water droplets cling to the wooden surfaces and a bright exit beckons in the distance. As the camera emerges from the tunnel, the enclosed space gives way to a narrow valley where the path shifts into shallow, flowing water. The scene then expands to reveal rocky cliffs and stone walls under a steady rainfall, with dense forest vegetation climbing the slopes. Finally, the camera continues its steady journey upstream through the greenery under the diffused light of an overcast sky.
